packageRules.description: Pin ESLint to the v9 maintenance line until eslint-config-next's bundled plugins (eslint-plugin-react, typescript-eslint) support ESLint 10's breaking context/scope-manager API changes.

Pin @babel/core to the v7 maintenance line. It's a transitive dep already patched at 7.29.6+ via a pnpm-workspace override; widening past v8 gives no security benefit and risks an unvalidated major. Lift this cap only as a deliberate, tested babel 8 upgrade.

Pin undici to the v7 maintenance line. It's a transitive Sanity-tooling dep already patched at 7.28.0+ via a pnpm-workspace override; the pin exists only to escape a vuln, not to track latest. Widening past v8 forces a major onto packages that declared ^7 with no security benefit. Lift this cap only as a deliberate, tested undici 8 upgrade.
